scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors cyan,yellow,green,blue,magenta "npm start --prefix shell" "npm start --prefix products" "npm start --prefix orders" "npm start --prefix account" "npm start --prefix checkout"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix shell && npm install --prefix products && npm install --prefix orders && npm install --prefix account && npm install --prefix checkout
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix shell && npm run build --prefix products && npm run build --prefix orders && npm run build --prefix account && npm run build --prefix checkout
